title: Sara Shackleton
compiled_truth: Sara Shackleton is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-06-21), Sara Shackleton sent 8259 and received 6698 emails, totalling 14957 interactions.
